name: HR bonus eligibility policy example
answer:
Employees must be in good standing at the end of the performance year to be eligible for the annual bonus.
Bonus payouts are capped at 50% of annual salary.
The company provides free commuter parking.

sources.title: HR Bonus Eligibility Policy
sources.content:
Employees must be in good standing at the end of the performance year to be eligible for the annual bonus.
Bonus payouts are capped at 10% of annual salary.
Bonus payouts depend on company and individual performance and are not guaranteed.
